description.text:
<color="#cf9736">Course:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Hero:</color> Sweet Science

Sweet Science’s secret training base is full of traps. No surprise there - a dangerous man is bound to have a dangerous home.

es.original:
<color="#cf9736">Course:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Hero:</color> Sweet Science

Sweet Science’s secret training base is full of traps. No surprise there - a dangerous man is bound to have a dangerous home.
es.translation:
<color="#cf9736">Desafío:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Personaje:</color> Sweet Science

Recorre el castillo secreto de Sweet Science, un lugar lleno de trampas, como era de esperar de un hombre tan peligroso.

de.original:
<color="#cf9736">Course:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Hero:</color> Sweet Science

Sweet Science’s secret training base is full of traps. No surprise there - a dangerous man is bound to have a dangerous home.
de.translation:
<color=“#cf9736“>Parcours:</color> Luftschloss
<color=“#cf9736“>Held:</color> Sweet Science

Die geheime Trainingsbasis von Sweet Science ist voller Fallen. Es wird wohl niemanden groß überraschen, dass ein gefährlicher Mann auch ein gefährliches Zuhause hat.

fr.original:
<color="#cf9736">Course:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Hero:</color> Sweet Science

Sweet Science’s secret training base is full of traps. No surprise there - a dangerous man is bound to have a dangerous home.
fr.translation:
<color="#cf9736">Parcours :</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Héros :</color> Sweet Science

La base d'entraînement secrète de Sweet Science est truffée de pièges. Mais ça n'étonnera personne : tout castagneur qui se respecte se doit d'avoir un chez-lui tout aussi dangereux !

ru.original:
<color="#cf9736">Course:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Hero:</color> Sweet Science

Sweet Science’s secret training base is full of traps. No surprise there - a dangerous man is bound to have a dangerous home.
ru.translation:
<color="#cf9736">Карта:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Герой:</color> Sweet Science

Секретная тренировочная база Sweet Science полна ловушек. Удивляться тут нечему: у опасного человека должен быть опасный дом.

pt.original:
<color="#cf9736">Course:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Hero:</color> Sweet Science

Sweet Science’s secret training base is full of traps. No surprise there - a dangerous man is bound to have a dangerous home.
pt.translation:
<color="#cf9736">Percurso:</color> Luftschloss
<color="#cf9736">Herói:</color> Sweet Science

A base secreta de treinamento de Sweet Science é cheia de armadilhas. Isso não é surpresa nenhuma - um homem perigoso há de ter uma casa perigosa.
